summary: Comprehensive testing of wallet modal currency additions and XRP Tag conditional rendering. Backend API authentication successful but frontend login failing with 401 error preventing full UI testing.

api_functionality.issue: API works correctly and returns valid token when tested directly
api_functionality.details: Login successful with paul@dyno.pt, returns accessToken in data object

api_functionality.issue: Requires Company ID for wallet validation
api_functionality.details: API accepts all currencies (BTC, SOL, XRP, RLUSD) but requires company setup first

critical_bugs.issue: Frontend login returns 401 error despite valid credentials
critical_bugs.details: API Response error: 401 status when submitting paul@dyno.pt / Katiekendra123@
critical_bugs.console_error: Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 401

integration_issues.issue: Mismatch between backend API (works) and frontend form (fails)
integration_issues.note: Cannot proceed with wallet modal testing due to authentication failure

passed_tests: Backend API login endpoint returns 200 with valid token
All 16 currencies present in ALLCRYPTOCURRENCIES array
WalletType and CryptoCode types include all required currencies
XRP Tag field conditionally rendered only for XRP and RLUSD
destination_tag included in payload for tag-based chains only
All required cryptocurrency icons exist (BNB, Solana, XRP, RLUSD, Polygon)
Frontend application loads without JavaScript errors
Login form UI components render correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Frontend login authentication is failing with 401 error despite backend API working correctly with the same credentials. Need to investigate: 1) Frontend form data formatting/encoding, 2) Request headers or payload structure mismatch, 3) Possible CORS or session issues, 4) Verify credentials are still valid for this environment. This blocks all wallet modal UI testing.

success_percentage.frontend_code_review: 100% (all currency and conditional logic correctly implemented)
